subject: grammar
title: Exercise — Subject-Verb Agreement
instruction: Underline the correct form of the verbs. Click the correct option.

questions.text: Despite the recent improvement in the economy, unemployment ___ to rise.
Our company hasn't changed its products for over 30 years but now the time ___ for a rethink.
The ideas in the report ___ presented in a very clear way.
The data ___ that the numbers of people buying mobile phones has remained stable for the past two years.
Transport to and from the airport ___ in the price.
There ___ no facilities like running water or electricity in the village.
All the information ___ interesting and well presented, but we need to consider the whole situation very carefully before we reach a decision.
There ___ some important news about the proposed new hospital in the local paper today.
